LanguageData.FCP_Shuttle_NCR_Vertibird.label: NCR vertibird
LanguageData.FCP_Shuttle_NCR_Vertibird.description: Vertibird is a designation for a series of vertical take-off and landing (VTOL) aircraft. These multipurpose tiltrotor aircraft were developed by the United States military and rapidly became a primary gunship and transport aircraft. This one is now in use by the New California Republic.
LanguageData.FCP_Shuttle_NCR_VertibirdIncoming.label: NCR vertibird (incoming)
LanguageData.FCP_Shuttle_NCR_VertibirdLeaving.label: NCR vertibird (leaving)
